objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for J1-J6 axis inspection, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, cable replacement, wrist service, and tool flange swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

constraint: J1 and J2 axis rings remain visible

trade_off.gain: reduces base cover alignment operations without trapping joint service items
trade_off.guardrail: J1 and J2 axis rings remain visible
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate base shell with J1/J2 datum labels but keep cartridges removable

verification.check: J1 and J2 axis rings remain visible

evolution.leaves_for_next: J1 and J2 axis rings remain visible | mit: Keep J2/J3/J5/J6 as removable cartridge covers.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for J1-J6 axis inspection, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, cable replacement, wrist service, and tool flange swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

constraint: cable spine remains replaceable and not buried inside closed links

trade_off.gain: removes loose covers and improves cable path visibility
trade_off.guardrail: cable spine remains replaceable and not buried inside closed links
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate hollow links with open cable channels

verification.check: cable spine remains replaceable and not buried inside closed links

evolution.leaves_for_next: cable spine remains replaceable and not buried inside closed links | mit: Expose axis rings and engrave J1-J6 datum labels.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for J1-J6 axis inspection, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, cable replacement, wrist service, and tool flange swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

constraint: joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links

trade_off.gain: preserves reducer, bearing, encoder, and wrist service access
trade_off.guardrail: joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

decision.rationale: keep J3/J5/J6 as removable joint cartridges

verification.check: joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links

evolution.leaves_for_next: joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links | mit: Use external replaceable cable spine and open link channels.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for J1-J6 axis inspection, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, cable replacement, wrist service, and tool flange swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

constraint: tool latch and utility ports remain external

trade_off.gain: tool interface can change without rebuilding wrist stack
trade_off.guardrail: tool latch and utility ports remain external
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

decision.rationale: keep tool flange as replaceable service module

verification.check: tool latch and utility ports remain external

evolution.leaves_for_next: tool latch and utility ports remain external | mit: Keep tool flange as separate service module.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for J1-J6 axis inspection, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, cable replacement, wrist service, and tool flange swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

constraint: spine clips on from outside and does not share joint cartridge fasteners

trade_off.gain: cable replacement becomes visible and teachable
trade_off.guardrail: spine clips on from outside and does not share joint cartridge fasteners
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if joint cartridges, axis datums, cable spine, or tool flange access are blocked.

verification.check: spine clips on from outside and does not share joint cartridge fasteners

evolution.leaves_for_next: spine clips on from outside and does not share joint cartridge fasteners | mit: Print links on side, keep channels upward, and verify cartridge clearance.
